---
title: 'Start Here'
date: '2017-09-05T07:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'To Vacs or not to Vacs, that is the question.'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '8366285747983530030'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/To Vacs or not to Vacs, that is the question./feed.atom'
---

<div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div>
<h2>
To Vax or Not To Vax</h2>
<h4>I remain unconvinced but I'm willing to learn...</h4>I operate from a default of not trusting any authority. I operate from a default that says if "everyone" agrees, it's probably wrong. If large government bodies, media, and high profit entities are pushing something, it's likely bad for you. On that basis alone, I remain skeptikal.&nbsp;<div><br /></div><div>However, I am willing to see the plus dies and benefits. I refuse to hold any position hook, line, and sinker. I am willing to see all the angles, and then make a decision I feel is best. Since vaccines cannot be undone, I will wait until I am sure. I am not sure today. We shall see.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div><div><div>To Be Continued...&nbsp;</div>
</div></div>
